content: Analyze AAPL revenue, margins, valuation risks, and the key catalysts to watch.

args.query: AAPL (Apple Inc.) analyze: recent and historical revenue trend; gross margin, operating margin, net margin; free cash flow; valuation metrics (P/E, forward P/E, EV/EBITDA, P/S), and analyst estimates; also highlight key valuation risks for AAPL and potential catalysts to watch.

_errors.error: [Financial Datasets API] request failed: 400 Bad Request

args.query: AAPL valuation metrics and estimates: current price, market cap, P/E (ttm and forward if available), EV/EBITDA, P/S; include dividend yield/buyback if available; provide analyst revenue/EPS estimates next 1-3 years and any recent revisions. Also include latest quarterly margin figures if available.
